steps.explain: Distribute $2a^2$ to each term inside the parentheses: $2a^2\cdot a+2a^2\cdot3$.

Evaluate choices:
  • A ($5a^3$): adding exponents incorrectly and combining unlike terms — eliminated.
  • B ($8a^5$): multiplying everything incorrectly — eliminated.
  • C ($2a^3+3$): dropped the $a^2$ on the second term — eliminated.
  • D ($2a^3+6a^2$): matches exactly. That confirms D is correct.
